title: Write a simple Oban.Testing perform_job assertion
prompt: Write a unit test `MyApp.Workers.EmailVerificationWorkerTest` that uses `Oban.Testing` to call `perform_job/3` against `MyApp.Workers.EmailVerificationWorker` with args `%{"email" => "test@example.com"}`. Assert the return is `:ok`. The test should `use MyApp.DataCase` and `use Oban.Testing, repo: MyApp.Repo`. Write to `test/my_app/workers/email_verification_worker_test.exs`.
tier_rationale: Textbook Oban.Testing example; the only trap is remembering that `perform_job/3` is the helper (not calling perform directly).
